text: Why is a CO2 type of fire extinguisher preferred for electrical installations?

options.text: It expands into a sticky visual foam barrier
It leaves no residue and does not damage any equipment
It can be safely deployed without isolating power circuits

explanation: CO2 is preferred for electrical installations because it is a non-conductive gas that extinguishes fire by displacing oxygen and cooling, and importantly, it leaves no residue that could damage sensitive electronic components.
